name: Diamond Genesis Drop #02 — AI Worker Charter
description:
The four-worker roster — Kava (lead), BEAN (watchdog), Gemini Flash (concierge), Claude Sonnet (content) — codified as a holder artifact. Documents the role, KPI, and capped budget for each AI worker funded by Diamond's treasury.

Unlockable perk: Read-only access to live AI worker dashboards.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
